content.text: How do I set up a Python virtual environment in Cursor?

To set up a Python virtual environment in Cursor, open the integrated terminal and run:

```bash
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
```

Cursor will automatically detect the virtual environment and use it for IntelliSense.
Can I configure which Python interpreter Cursor uses by default?
Yes! Open the Command Palette (Cmd+Shift+P) and search for 'Python: Select Interpreter'. Choose your preferred interpreter from the list, or enter the path to a custom one.
